description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for 1 sec, then enters [God's Proxy] state for 10 sec, enhancing skills. [God's Proxy]: ATK increases by [264->314], and Normal Attack DMG increases by 100%. This effect cannot be dispelled.

ATK increases by [135->192], and Magic Evasion increases by [360->240]. When [Holy Sword Ea] is equipped, damage dealt to non-hero enemies increases by 20%, and damage taken from non-hero enemies is reduced by 20%.

light.unified: Physical Evasion increases by [600->140] for the duration.

description.unified: [Valiant Dash] [(added) Stuns the target for 1.5 sec], and reduces Cooldown by [10%->{0}%] upon a Critical Hit.
[Proxy of God] increases Dodge Chance by an additional [250->400] and ATK Spd by an additional {0} for the duration of the Skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases [(added) Magic Evasion by 360] and own DMG dealt to [bosses->heroes] by {0}%. [(removed) DEF Boost by 50%].
